# Generated files — DO NOT hand-edit

Some mission files are **generated by `Tools/LoadoutManager`** (`dotnet run -c RELEASE`). Hand-editing them looks like it works — until the next regen silently reverts your change. This bit PR #920 (a hand-edit to `Common_BalanceInit.sqf` vanished on regen). If a fix belongs in one of these files, **edit the LoadoutManager C#/data emit source instead**, then regenerate.

## Confirmed generated (edit the generator, not the file)
| File | Owned by |
|---|---|
| `Common/Functions/Common_BalanceInit.sqf` | `Tools/LoadoutManager/` (data + emit layer) — confirmed reverted a hand-edit, PR #920 |
| `Parameters.hpp` | `Tools/LoadoutManager/` — confirmed generated earlier in the campaign |

## Suspected generated (verify before hand-editing)
| File pattern | Note |
|---|---|
| `Root_GUE.sqf`, `Root_TKGUE.sqf` (and per-side/per-map `Root_*` variant files) | Flagged as the LoadoutManager per-side/per-map generated category (routing brief 2026-07-08). Treat as generated until proven otherwise — this is why code-health flags H1/H3/H4 (which touch `Root_GUE*`) are NOT fixed as `.sqf` edits and are deferred to the generator layer. |
| `Loadout_*`, `Groups_*` | Suspected LoadoutManager-owned (H17). Verify against the emit source before editing. |

## How to tell
1. Check for a generated banner at the top of the file (see "Action" below — we are adding these).
2. Cross-check `Tools/LoadoutManager/` — if a C#/data source emits the file, it's generated.
3. When in doubt: apply your edit, run `dotnet run -c RELEASE` in `Tools/LoadoutManager`, and `git diff`. If your edit reverts (or the file changes), it's generated.

## Mirror parity
`Missions_Vanilla/…takistan` and `…zargabad` are the vanilla mirrors of the Chernarus source-of-truth. For **non-generated** SQF (most `Server/`, `Client/`, `Common/Init` files), hand-mirror the same edit to all three folders (the campaign's established pattern — a subsequent regen produces an empty diff, confirming parity). For **generated** files, only the generator + regen should touch the mirrors.

## Action (follow-up, needs the generator layer)
Add a header line to every generated mission file at emit time:
```
//--- GENERATED by Tools/LoadoutManager — edit the C#/data emit source, DO NOT hand-edit (reverted on regen).
```
That header must be added in the **LoadoutManager emit code** (so it survives regen), not by hand-editing the generated files — which is exactly the trap this doc exists to prevent. Tracked as code-health **H17**; needs `dotnet`/LoadoutManager access (see H14).
